system.description:
You have an astonishing ability to find or make friends in the most unlikely places.

Level 1: Gain Connect as a bonus skill. Once per game session, when dealing with a group or organization, the GM picks someone among them as a friend of yours or one who takes a great liking to you. They’ll do favors that don’t expose them to serious danger or loss, and the friendship will continue unless you or your allies directly harm them or things they love.

Level 2: Your Charisma modifier increases by +1, to a maximum of +2. Once per session, spend an hour socializing with someone. They become your good friend unless they have a very good reason not to be, and will remain so until you or your allies betray the friendship.
